# Cross-Project Lessons (xp-rules.md)
# Rules generated by the /ev command are accumulated here. Maximum 10 entries.

# HOW THIS FILE WORKS
# When you complete a project, type /ev in the PM agent.
# The PM will extract lessons, abstract them into universal rules, and output them in XP format.
# Copy and paste the output here.
# On the next project, the PM will automatically embed these rules into CLAUDE.md (before B-8).
# This is how PM Zero achieves self-evolution across projects.

# FORMAT (fixed — no freeform text allowed)
# ## XP-[sequence]: [1-line title]
# - Trigger situation: [what you were doing when it happened — 1 sentence]
# - Surface symptom: [the specific error or problem — 1 sentence]
# - Root cause: [why it happened — abstracted — 1 sentence]
# - Rule: [trigger] → [action]

# MANAGEMENT RULES
# - Max 10 entries. When full: merge similar rules or delete stale ones.
# - Rules already integrated into B-1 through B-7 of CLAUDE.md → remove from here (avoid duplication).
# - Use /audit monthly to review and refresh this file.

# --- RULES START BELOW THIS LINE ---
